                `<footer id="bottom" data-anchor="true" data-name="Footer" class="o_footer o_colored_level o_cc ">`

                        `<div class="col-lg-5 pt24 pb24">`
                            `<h5>`About us`</h5>`
                            `<p>`We are a team of passionate people whose goal is to improve everyone's life through disruptive products. We build great products to solve your business problems.

                        `</div>`
                        `<div class="col-lg-4 offset-lg-1 pt24 pb24">`

`<a href="#" class="btn btn-primary demo-login-btn mb-1" data-username="admin" data-password="admin" title="Login as admin user"><i class="fa fa-user-secret me-1">``</i>`Admin
`</a>`

route====>https://abdelhadieddiraa46080.o19.oeducat.org/openeducat

the full html===>

`<div class="oe_row oe_spaced">` `<div class="oe_span12">`
`<h2 class="oe_slogan">`OpenEduCat Achievement`</h2>` `<h3 class="oe_slogan">`Manage
student achievements`</h3>` `</div>` `<div class="oe_span6">`
`<div class="oe_demo oe_picture oe_screenshot">`

students. Track achievement of student by type, date &amp; other details.`</p>`

</section>

<section class="oe_container oe_dark">
    <div class="oe_row oe_spaced">
        <h2 class="oe_slogan">Student Achievement Information</h2>
        <div class="oe_span6">
            <p class="oe_mt32">Maintain all information of student's achievements, achievement types
            and much more.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="oe_span6">
            <div class="oe_row_img oe_centered">
                <img class="oe_picture oe_screenshot" src="/openeducat_achievement_enterprise/static/description/achievement.png">
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="oe_container">
    <div class="oe_mt16 oe_mb16">
        <h2 class="oe_slogan">Need Any Help?</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="oe_slogan">

    </div>
</section>
